name: Mall of America
subTagline: A Global Platform. 40 Million Stories Per Year.

stats.label: Annual Visitors
stats.note: More than Disney World + Grand Canyon combined

stats.label: Square Feet
stats.note: Largest entertainment complex in North America

stats.label: Stores & Venues
stats.note: Retail, dining, entertainment under one roof

leasingTiers.title: Luxury & Flagship
leasingTiers.description: Permanent flagship placement in high-traffic premium wings with white-glove concierge access and dedicated valet zones.

leasingTiers.title: Mid-Tier Retail
leasingTiers.description: High-visibility inline and anchor positions with optimal cross-traffic from entertainment zones and food halls.

leasingTiers.title: Pop-Up & Seasonal
leasingTiers.description: Flexible short-term activations in the Rotunda, atrium spaces, and specialty kiosks. Perfect for product launches and brand moments.

leasingTiers.title: Food & Beverage
leasingTiers.description: Full-service restaurants, fast casual, kiosks, and the Culinary District — a dedicated dining destination drawing visitors independently.

sponsorshipTiers.description: Naming rights, permanent experiential installations, and full-spectrum brand integration across the property.
Seasonal takeovers, holiday campaigns, and pop-up zones timed to peak traffic moments.
Mall-wide LED network and digital touchpoints reaching every visitor across 5.6M sq ft.

eventSpaces.name: The Rotunda
eventSpaces.description: The iconic 7-story central atrium — the most recognizable indoor event space in the Midwest. Visible from all levels, architecturally stunning, and purpose-built for spectacle.

eventSpaces.name: Huntington Bank Stadium Club
eventSpaces.description: Premium event space with luxury finishes, full AV infrastructure, and direct mall access for curated brand experiences.

eventSpaces.name: Parkview Meeting Spaces
eventSpaces.description: Flexible meeting rooms and event suites overlooking Nickelodeon Universe — a one-of-a-kind backdrop for memorable corporate events.

eventSpaces.name: Nickelodeon Universe
eventSpaces.description: 7-acre indoor theme park — the largest in the US — available for exclusive buyout events, creating unparalleled wow moments for guests.

attractions.name: Nickelodeon Universe
attractions.description: 7-acre indoor theme park. 30+ rides. The nation's largest indoor entertainment venue — a destination-within-the-destination.

attractions.name: SEA LIFE Minnesota
attractions.description: Immersive aquarium experience with 10,000+ sea creatures and a 300ft underwater tunnel.

attractions.name: FlyOver America
attractions.description: Cinematic ride experience that simulates flight over iconic American landscapes. 5-star rated attraction.

attractions.name: Crayola Experience
attractions.description: Interactive creative playground spanning 70,000 sq ft — the largest Crayola attraction in the world.
